CreateBlb.desc: Description of the LoadBalancer instance. Length 0–450 bytes, supports Chinese characters, defaults to empty.
CreateBlb.name: Name of the LoadBalancer for easy identification. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -\_/. characters. Auto-generated if not specified.
CreateBlb.vpcId: ID of the VPC to which the LoadBalancer instance belongs.
CreateBlb.subnetId: ID of the subnet to which the LoadBalancer instance belongs.
CreateBlb.address: Private IP address of the LoadBalancer instance; must fall within the subnet CIDR range.
CreateBlb.type: Type of the LoadBalancer instance. Defaults to standard type if not specified; pass "ipv6" to create an IPv6 blb.
CreateBlb.eip: Bind an existing EIP. Value is the EIP address.
CreateBlb.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to attach to the instance.
CreateBlb.tags.tagKey: Tag key. May contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -\_ /. special characters. Length 1–65.
CreateBlb.tags.tagValue: Tag value. May contain uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and -\_ /. special characters. Length 0–65.
CreateBlb.billing: Order information. Required when purchasing a prepaid blb.
CreateBlb.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Currently only Prepaid is supported.
CreateBlb.billing.billingMethod: Billing method for postpaid instances. "BySpec" for fixed specification, "ByCapacityUnit" for usage-based billing.
CreateBlb.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for postpaid; must be set for prepaid.
CreateBlb.performanceLevel: Performance specification. Defaults to shared. Valid values: "small1" (Standard 1), "small2" (Standard 2), "medium1" (Enhanced 1), "medium2" (Enhanced 2), "large1" (Ultra-large 1), "large2" (Ultra-large 2), "large3" (Ultra-large 3). "unlimited" (no speed limit) is also available for postpaid usage-based billing.
CreateBlb.autoRenewLength: Duration for auto-renewal when creating a prepaid blb. Range depends on autoRenewTimeUnit: 1–9 for month, 1–3 for year.
CreateBlb.autoRenewTimeUnit: Time unit for auto-renewal when creating a blb. Valid values: "month" or "year" (default: "month").
CreateBlb.resourceGroupId: Resource group ID to bind when creating a blb.
CreateBlb.allowDelete: Whether deletion is allowed. Defaults to true (deletion permitted).
CreateBlb.allowModify: Defaults to true, meaning modification protection is disabled and instance changes via the console are allowed. Set to false to enable modification protection and block console changes (note: OpenAPI calls are not restricted).
CreateBlb.modificationProtectionReason: Reason for disallowing modification. Supports up to 128 characters.
CreateBlb.allocateIpv6: Whether to allocate an IPv6 address. true allocates an IPv6 address; false does not.
